narrative:
Darby-North (precinct in Pickaway County) has 792 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
